{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/95986478?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/SnailSploit", "id": 95986478, "login": "SnailSploit", "node_id": "U_kgDOBbijLg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48022", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-319", "name": "Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-522", "name": "Insufficiently Protected Credentials"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-940", "name": "Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel"}], "description": "### Impact
Wreck strips credential headers (Authorization, Cookie, Proxy-Authorization) before following a cross-origin redirect, but the origin check compares hostnames only and ignores scheme and port. As a result, credentials are forwarded intact across same-host port changes and HTTPS-to-HTTP downgrades, allowing a co-tenant on an adjacent port or a network-position attacker capable of forging a redirect to capture bearer tokens, session cookies, and proxy credentials and impersonate the victim against the upstream service. The fix replaces the hostname comparison with a full-origin comparison (scheme, host, and port), aligning the behavior with the WHATWG Fetch same-origin definition used by browsers.

### Patches
Upgrade to >= 18.1.2.

### Workarounds
- Set `redirects: 0` (default) and handle redirects manually with a strict origin check.
- Use the `beforeRedirect` hook to inspect the redirect target and abort or strip sensitive headers before the follow-on request.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00123, "percentile": 0.02477}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-11T13:27:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48022"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-11T13:27:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hapijs/wreck/security/advisories/GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc", "https://github.com/hapijs/wreck/commit/b93323b63ad3adb14d2b4019d77219182211641e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hapijs/wreck/security-advisories/GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hapijs/wreck", "summary": "@hapi/wreck: Sensitive credential headers leak across cross-port and cross-scheme redirects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-11T13:27:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x426-x7cc-3fpc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "18.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@hapi/wreck"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 18.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @hapi/wreck: Sensitive credential headers leak across cross-port and cross-scheme redirects
